family.name: ColorPicker
exclusions: Layout=compact + Format=all (no cabe todos los inputs)
Layout=compact + Alpha=yes (no hay espacio para alpha slider)

ariaAttributes: Saturation area: role='slider' 2D con aria-valuenow='[s, v]' + aria-valuetext descriptivo
Hue slider: role='slider' aria-valuemin=0 aria-valuemax=360 aria-valuenow=[deg]
Swatches: role='button' + aria-label='Color #[hex]' + aria-pressed si selected
Eyedropper: aria-label='Selector de color del cursor'
keyboardNav: Arrow keys en saturation: mueve cursor 2D
Arrow keys en hue slider: cambia 1° (Shift+Arrow = 10°)
a11y.focusTechnique: ring 2px en control activo; indicator visible en saturation area

componentDescriptions.ColorSwatch:
Color swatch. State: default/hover/selected/focused/disabled. Size: sm(20)/md(28)/lg(36). Selected state con border + outline + opcional checkmark.

🔑 ARIA:
• role='button' + aria-label='Color #[hex]'
• aria-pressed='true' si selected

⌨️ Keyboard:
• Tab navega, Enter selecciona

WCAG 2.2 AA.
componentDescriptions.ColorPicker:
Selector de color completo. Layout: compact (sidebar picker) / default (form popover) / expanded (dedicated page). Format: hex / rgb / hsl / all (tabs). Alpha: yes/no (transparency slider).

🔑 ARIA:
• role='dialog' con sub-controls
• Saturation area: slider 2D
• Hue/Alpha: slider con aria-valuenow
• Eyedropper: browser EyeDropper API

⌨️ Keyboard:
• Arrow keys en saturation 2D
• Arrow keys en hue (Shift = 10°)
• Tab entre controls

🎯 Focus:
• Ring visible en cada control
• Tabindex trap en popover

Tokens: 22, prefijo cp-.
WCAG 2.2 AA.

WCAG 1.4.1 (color no es único indicador): contrast info opcional mostrar WCAG ratio del color seleccionado vs background.

_decisions.why: ColorSwatch standalone útil para presets/palettes display sin picker completo. Reutilizable.
Compact para inline sidebar (SaaS); default para form popover; expanded para dedicated brand page.
Developers prefieren hex; designers HSL; export RGB. 'all' muestra tabs.

_decisions.what: Saturation area es slider 2D (role='slider' con aria-valuetext)
_decisions.why: WAI-ARIA Color Picker pattern: 2D slider con arrow keys + descriptive aria-valuetext ('Saturation 80%, Brightness 60%').
